titleStmt.title: SII 25.108: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 108. (A.R. No. 108 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
This record may be assigned to c. 12th century on palaeographical grounds.

It records the gift of 25 cows and a bull for maintaining a perpetual lamp to the deity Śrītaḷi-Paramēśvara of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu by Tirukkāḍikuḍidēvan, a veḷḷāḷa of Kūṟṟalūr in the same nāḍu. The cowherd Vēndan-bhaṭṭan alias Tiruvīdikkōṉ took the above gift and undertook to measure out a uḻakku ghee by śūla-uḻakku to maintain a perpetual lamp in the above temple. The king of this record may be identified with Jaṭāº. Śrīvallabha with Tirumaḍanḍaiyum praśasti whose accession has been placed in 1101 A.D. He was a predecessor of Māṟavarmaṉ Parākrama Pāṇḍya of accession 1143 A.D.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIV, No. 246.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vallava devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 Āvatu
keraḷaciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu brahmadecan tirupputtūr śrītaḷip parameśvaraṟku Innāṭṭuk kaṭaṟṟalūr
veḷḷāḷaṉ tirukkāṭikkuṭi tevan vaitta tirununtāviḷakku 1 Oṉṟukku nittañ cūla Uḻaikkāl Uḻa
kku ney cantirātittaval Aṭṭuvatāka Ittevar Iṭaiyuḷ ventaṉ paṭṭarāṉa tiruvitit koṉkai
k koṇṭa cāvāmuvāp perum pacu 2 10 5- m Eṟute 1- m . Itu śrī māheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
